scripts.start: npm run build && node -e "require('http').createServer((req, res) => { const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const file = path.join('./dist', req.url === '/' ? 'index.html' : req.url); res.setHeader('Content-Type', 'text/html'); res.end(fs.readFileSync(file)); }).listen(process.env.PORT || 3000);"
